titleStmt.title: SII 26.19: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 19. (A.R. No. 19 of 1909.) POṈ-AMARĀVATI, TIRUMAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Sundararāja-perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: Śaka 1375, Mithuna śu. 11, Monday, Anurādha = 1453 A.D., June 18 The
ended on the previous day at 24.

summary.p: It registers a gift of money by the Śrībhaṇḍārttār of Aḻagapperumāḷ-viṇṇavaremberumāṉ temple at Poṉṉamarāpati in Puṟamalai-nāḍu to two women- Mallāyi and her daughter Ulaguḍaiyanāchchi and others who were strangers to the place but who had desired to settle down there by accepting service in the temple.
Cf. Inscriptions (Texts) of the Pudukkottai State, No. 793 where the text of the entire record is given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
subhastiśrīRead svastiśrī . śakāttam 1000 3 100 7 10 5ṉ meṟc cellāniṉṟa mituṉanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapa(k)kṣattu tuvā
teciyum comavāramum peṟṟa Aṉuṣattu nāḷ puṟamalaināṭṭup poṉṉamarāpatiyil
perumāḷ Aḻakapperumāḷ viṇṇavar Emperumāṉ tirukkoyilil śrīpaṇṭārattārom I
kkoyilil Emperumāṉaṭiyāḷ mallāyikkum Ivaḷ makaḷ Ulakuṭaiyanācci Uḷḷiṭ
ṭāṟkum piṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivarkaḷ parateciyāka Ivvūrile
vantu Iruntu muṉṉāḷ naḷa varuṣam kiṣāmaRead kṣāmattilum piṟimātūtaRead kṣāmapiṟacāpati varuṣam kiṣāmattilumRead kṣāmaIrakkiṣiRead irakṣi •ppār Illāmal nalaṅki kaṭaṉkāṟarāl vitaṉamāṉatu koṇṭu Ivarkaḷ poṉṉa(ṉa)marāpati Ūravaraiyum Eṅkaḷaiyum kūṭṭi nāṅkaḷ Ivvemperumāṉukku Aṭimai Ākap pukuntom Eṅkaḷai
kkāppāṟṟikkoḷḷaveṇum Eṉṟu collukai Āle nāṅkaḷum Ūravarum Immari Ātikkupporunti Inta Ulakuṭaināccikku Ūravarum mallāyikkum poṉṉaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭāṟkum cipaṇṭārattilum Āka melivu kuṟai Uṇṭāṉatum tirttu Ivarkaḷaiyum Emperumāṉ Aṭimai Āka muṉpe tiruilaicciṉaiSee the rest of the lines in Pudukkottai Vol. Page 541 G. No. 793.
Digital edition of SII 26.19 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
